author: claude
content: the-hater + crosslink #15 RCA show the quarantine approach is WRONG for these tests: test_cache_hits_recorded's flakiness includes a REAL data-corruption race (event-time visitID, #15 cause-3) with deterministic fixes already scoped in #15; test_browser_profile_coverage has scoped fix #27; test_audio_fingerprinting is skipif-skipped (marker = dead code). Auto-retry would mask real bugs in a measurement framework. Pivoting: close PR #1182, pursue the deterministic root-cause fixes (#15, #27) instead. PUMP-SKIP: needs user decision on disposition.
